name: Homemade Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour, granulated sugar, packed brown sugar, salt, and baking soda until well blended. Cut in the vegetable shortening until the mixture resembles cornmeal in texture. Transfer the mix to a very large, airtight container. Label with date and contents. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 10-12 weeks. Makes about 16 cups Homemade Cookie Mix.
